description_long: This object is a rectangular piece of sushi, most likely representing a slice of salmon sashimi placed atop a slightly irregular, flat brown surface that resembles a piece of seaweed or a mat. The sushi features a vibrant orange color with white marbling lines, mimicking the natural fat streaks found in salmon. The top surface is gently domed, while the sides are straight and the ends are slightly tapered, giving it a realistic cut appearance. The base mat is thin, flexible, and extends beyond the sushi, with uneven edges that suggest a natural or hand-cut presentation. There are no visible garnishes, toppings, or additional elements such as wasabi, ginger, or chopsticks. The overall presentation is clean and minimalist, focusing attention on the quality and texture of the fish.
description: A realistic, rectangular slice of salmon sushi with white marbling, resting on a thin, brown mat with uneven edges. The sushi is vibrant orange and has a gently domed top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the domed, marbled top of the salmon sushi and the full width of the brown mat beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rectangular profile and the length of the sushi, with the mat extending beyond the sushi on both sides.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the marbled top and the mat's uneven edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the length and thickness of the sushi, with the mat visible underneath.
